text.title: Internal Link Rotation Schedule Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: 6-cluster solo site running a Q3 rotation with one SLA miss and recovery.

section.title: Setup
section.p: Solo founder with 120-page blog and 6 clusters. Bi-weekly Tue 9am ET slot reserved. Graph spec from prior methodology, crawl_date 2026-06-15.

section.title: Rotation calendar (Q3)
section.p: Slot 3 explicitly paused (operator off-grid the week of 2026-08-04); indie-launch slot re-scheduled into slot 7 (2026-09-29 — extra slot covered by overlap into next quarter).

list.item: Slot 5 customer-research: 42 min, 2 fixes_shipped, 0 deferred (healthy cluster).

section.title: SLA observation + recovery
section.p: Slot 1's deferred fix DF-001 (due 2026-08-06) slipped to 2026-08-09. Validator flagged it. Escalated to slot 4 (marketing-attribution's first 5 min). DF-001 shipped, status='done'. Lesson recorded in retrospective.

list.item: Total fixes shipped: 19; deferred opened: 8; deferred closed by quarter end: 7; carry-forward: 1.
SLA misses: 1 (DF-001) — recovered in next slot.
Recurring offender: stripe-ops (highest fix count); rotation order Q4 keeps it at slot 1 for early attention.
Next quarter adjustment: insert a "no-findings" reporting flag so audit_log rows can document healthy clusters without fixes.

text.example: Graph spec fresh + 6 clusters + bi-weekly slot reserved + 5 of 6 slots executed + 1 explicit pause + retrospective written → APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
